journeys.title: Account Deletion (Full Cascade)

errorCases.result: 409: Must transfer or delete shops first — show shop names as links

nodes.why: Delete member slug from slugs table

nodes.why: auth.admin.deleteUser() — triggers CASCADE

nodes.why: CASCADE: members row deleted

nodes.label: Run Deletion Trigger
nodes.why: BEFORE DELETE trigger: handle_member_deletion() — release member slug + owned shop slugs

nodes.label: Cascade FK Deletes
nodes.why: CASCADE: cart items, recently viewed, shop memberships deleted

nodes.why: Redirect to /

journeys.title: Recently Viewed (Dual-Source)
journeys.description: Recently viewed listings use dual-source storage: localStorage for guests, DB-backed API for authenticated users. Includes merge on login and clear history.

nodes.label: Track View Locally
nodes.why: addRecentlyViewed() saves to localStorage

nodes.label: Fetch from API
nodes.why: Returns recently viewed with listing data

nodes.label: Fetch from Storage

nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedMerge() detects login

nodes.label: Dedup and Insert
nodes.why: Dedup + merge to DB

nodes.label: Silent Complete
nodes.why: No toast — silent merge

nodes.label: Read View IDs
nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedListings() reads IDs from useRecentlyViewed()

nodes.label: Fetch Listing Data
nodes.why: Only returns active, non-deleted listings. Stale IDs silently filtered. Max 30 IDs.

nodes.label: Render Strip
nodes.why: Horizontal scroll of ListingCards. CSS scroll-snap, 160px mobile / 220px desktop. role=region + aria-label.

nodes.label: Render Nothing
nodes.why: Strip returns null — no recently viewed items or all stale/deleted

nodes.label: Clear localStorage
nodes.why: clearRecentlyViewed() — clear localStorage

journeys.title: Context Switching (Member / Shop Identity)
journeys.description: Identity system overview: member/shop context switching via Zustand store, X-Nessi-Context header on every request, localStorage persistence, page load rehydration, and edge case handling.

nodes.label: Set Default Context
nodes.why: User logs in — default: { type: 'member' }

nodes.label: Check Shop Membership
nodes.why: Check if user belongs to shops

nodes.label: Show Context Switcher
nodes.why: Navbar shows context switcher dropdown (if shops exist)

nodes.label: Switch to Member
nodes.why: switchToMember() — Zustand: { type: 'member' }, X-Nessi-Context: member

nodes.label: Switch to Shop
nodes.why: switchToShop(shopId, shopName) — Zustand: { type: 'shop', shopId }, X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId}

nodes.label: Persist Context
nodes.why: Persisted to localStorage — survives refresh, tab close, re-open

nodes.label: Create as Member
nodes.why: member_id = user.id, shop_id = null — appears on /member/[slug]

nodes.label: Create as Shop
nodes.why: shop_id = shopId, member_id = null — appears on /shop/[slug]

nodes.label: Member Dashboard
nodes.why: Personal dashboard KPIs

nodes.label: Shop Dashboard
nodes.why: Shop dashboard KPIs

nodes.label: No Shop Settings
nodes.why: Shop settings not available in member context

nodes.why: Accessible based on role

nodes.label: Upload as Member
nodes.why: Assets stored in members/{userId}/

nodes.label: Upload as Shop
nodes.why: Assets stored in shops/{shopId}/

nodes.label: Rehydrate Store
nodes.why: Zustand rehydrates from localStorage

nodes.label: Set Default Context
nodes.why: No stored context — default to { type: 'member' }

nodes.label: Restore Member
nodes.why: Stored member context — set context: member

nodes.label: Restore Shop
nodes.why: Stored shop context — set context: shop:{id}

nodes.label: Validate Membership
nodes.why: First API call validates shop membership

nodes.label: Shop Deleted
nodes.why: Shop deleted while user in shop context — next API call → 403 → revocation

nodes.label: Role Changed
nodes.why: Role changed (e.g., owner to contributor). API checks role per request, UI may show stale until refresh.

nodes.label: Multi-Tab Sync
nodes.why: Multiple tabs in different contexts — localStorage sync via StorageEvent, both tabs update

nodes.label: Storage Cleared
nodes.why: localStorage cleared or incognito — defaults to member context

journeys.title: Guest Cart → Login → Merge
journeys.description: Guest adds items to localStorage cart, logs in, and cart silently merges to the database.

nodes.label: Validate Cart State
nodes.why: Client-side validation: own listing, already in cart, cart full

nodes.label: Save to localStorage
nodes.why: Add item to localStorage cart (listingId + priceCents snapshot). No API calls.

nodes.label: Update Cart Badge
nodes.why: CartIcon badge count updates via Zustand store

nodes.label: Show Added Toast
nodes.why: Toast: 'Added to cart'

nodes.label: Group by Seller
nodes.why: Items grouped by seller for display

nodes.label: Render Cart Items
nodes.why: Cart items with remove/clear actions. Checkout button disabled in MVP.

nodes.label: Detect Auth Change
nodes.why: useCartMerge() detects auth state change. Background hook — user sees nothing.

nodes.label: Read Guest Cart
nodes.why: Read localStorage cart items

nodes.label: Merge Cart to DB
nodes.why: Server validates every guest item: listing exists, not sold, not own listing, not already in DB cart.

nodes.label: Skip Invalid Items
nodes.why: Invalid/duplicate/own-listing items silently dropped. No errors surfaced to user.

nodes.label: Insert Valid Items
nodes.why: Insert valid items into cart table

nodes.label: Clear Guest Cart
nodes.why: Clear localStorage guest cart. No toast, no redirect. Cart page now shows DB-backed items.

journeys.title: Guest Recently Viewed
journeys.description: Guest's listing views are tracked in localStorage, deduped and capped at 30 items. On login, views silently merge to the database.

nodes.label: Track View Locally

nodes.label: Dedup and Reorder
nodes.why: Deduped + reordered, max 30 items

nodes.label: Read View IDs
nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedListings() reads IDs from localStorage via useRecentlyViewed()

nodes.label: Fetch Listing Data
nodes.why: No auth required. Only returns active, non-deleted listings. Stale IDs silently filtered.

nodes.label: Render Strip
nodes.why: RecentlyViewedStrip renders horizontal scroll of ListingCards. CSS scroll-snap, 160px mobile / 220px desktop.

nodes.label: Render Nothing
nodes.why: Strip returns null — no recently viewed items or all stale/deleted

nodes.label: Detect Login
nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedMerge() detects login

nodes.label: Dedup and Insert
nodes.why: Guest views merged to DB, deduped on server

nodes.label: Silent Complete
nodes.why: No toast — silent merge

journeys.title: Login (Email + Password)
journeys.description: Existing user logs in with email and password. Triggers background cart merge and recently-viewed merge as side effects.

nodes.label: Open Login Modal
nodes.why: User clicks Log In in navbar, modal opens

nodes.label: Enter Credentials
nodes.why: Enter email + password

nodes.label: Authenticate User
nodes.why: signInWithPassword() called via Supabase client

nodes.label: Set Session Cookies
nodes.why: Session cookies set on successful authentication

nodes.label: Close Modal
nodes.why: onSuccess callback fires, modal closes

nodes.label: Stay on Current Page
nodes.why: User stays on current page after login

nodes.label: Merge Guest Cart
nodes.why: useCartMerge() merges localStorage cart to DB. Silent, no toast. See guest-cart.json.

nodes.label: Merge Recently Viewed
nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — POST /api/recently-viewed/merge. Deduplicates on server. Silent.

nodes.label: Show Resend Button
nodes.why: Inline resend verification button appears

nodes.label: Resend OTP
nodes.why: resendOtp() sends new verification code to user's email

nodes.label: Verify Then Login

journeys.title: Logout
journeys.description: User logs out, clearing session cookies, resetting context store, and redirecting to homepage.

nodes.label: Sign Out User
nodes.why: signOut() called via Supabase client

nodes.label: Reset Context Store
nodes.why: Zustand store reverts to default member context

nodes.label: Redirect Home
nodes.why: Redirect to /

journeys.title: Follow / Unfollow
journeys.description: Follow or unfollow members and shops to get updates on their activity.

nodes.label: View Profile Page
nodes.why: User views a member profile or shop page with a FollowButton and follower count. Button hidden when viewing own profile/shop.

nodes.label: Tap Follow Button
nodes.why: FollowButton checks auth (shows sign-in toast if unauthenticated). useFollowToggle fires mutation with isCurrentlyFollowing=false, optimistically sets status to following and increments count cache.

nodes.label: Create Follow
nodes.why: Validates target_type (member|shop), target_id, checks auth, calls createFollowServer. Returns 201 on success.

nodes.label: Insert Follow Row
nodes.why: INSERT into follows table. update_follower_count() trigger increments target's follower_count column.

nodes.label: Show Following State
nodes.why: Button updates to 'Following' state (filled primary), follower count increments. Toast: 'Following — You are now following {name}.' onSettled invalidates status, count, and following queries.

nodes.label: View Followed Entity
nodes.why: User views a member or shop they already follow. FollowButton shows 'Following' state. On hover/focus, changes to 'Unfollow' with destructive styling.

nodes.label: Tap Following Button
nodes.why: useFollowToggle fires mutation with isCurrentlyFollowing=true, optimistically sets status to not-following and decrements count cache. Toast: 'Unfollowed — You unfollowed {name}.'

nodes.label: Delete Follow
nodes.why: Reads target_type and target_id from query params (not body). Calls deleteFollowServer, returns 200 on success.

nodes.label: Delete Follow Row
nodes.why: DELETE from follows table. update_follower_count() trigger decrements target's follower_count (clamped to 0 via GREATEST).

nodes.label: Show Follow State
nodes.why: Button reverts to 'Follow' state (outline primary), follower count decrements. onSettled invalidates status, count, and following queries.

nodes.label: Navigate to Profile
nodes.why: FollowButton mounts on profile page. useFollowStatus hook fires query with targetType and targetId.

nodes.label: Fetch Follow Status
nodes.why: Returns { is_following: boolean } via getFollowStatusServer using maybeSingle() lookup

nodes.label: Render Button State
nodes.why: FollowButton renders as 'Follow' (outline) or 'Following' (filled primary) based on is_following response. Follower count badge also displayed.

nodes.label: Open Following Page
nodes.why: User navigates to /dashboard/following. Page is protected by proxy.ts. useFollowing() hook fires query on mount to fetch all followed entities.

nodes.label: Fetch Following List
nodes.why: Returns FollowingItem[] with name and avatar_url resolved via batch queries on members and shops tables. Optional target_type filter.

nodes.label: Render Following List
nodes.why: Renders FollowingCard for each item — avatar, linked name, type pill, relative date, Unfollow button. Each card manages its own useFollowToggle mutation with toast feedback. Empty state shows heart icon + 'You are not following anyone yet' + Browse CTA.

journeys.title: Route Protection (proxy.ts)
journeys.description: proxy.ts intercepts every request to enforce auth on /dashboard/* routes, redirect completed onboarding users, and refresh session cookies on public pages.

nodes.label: Intercept Request
nodes.why: proxy.ts intercepts incoming request

nodes.label: Check Request Path
nodes.why: Match request path against known patterns

nodes.label: Pass Through
nodes.why: Skip auth check for /api/*, /_next/*, /auth/* paths

nodes.label: Verify JWT
nodes.why: getUser() verifies JWT from cookies for /dashboard/* routes

nodes.label: Redirect to Home
nodes.why: Redirect unauthenticated users to /

nodes.label: Refresh Public Session

journeys.title: Listing Lifecycle (Create, Edit, Manage)
journeys.description: Full listing lifecycle: 5-step create wizard with photo upload, edit wizard with partial saves, dashboard management with status tabs, and listing actions (publish, sold, archive, duplicate, delete).

nodes.label: Create Draft
nodes.why: Create empty draft listing

nodes.label: Draft State
nodes.why: Listing in draft state — requires 2+ photos to publish. localStorage persistence for create wizard.

nodes.label: Publish Listing
nodes.why: status=active, sets published_at. Visible in search, browse, shop page. Editable until sold.

nodes.label: Mark as Sold
nodes.why: status=sold, sets sold_at (final state)

nodes.label: Archive Listing
nodes.why: status=archived. Hidden from search. Kept for history. Can be reactivated.

nodes.label: Reactivate Listing
nodes.why: status=active — reactivate archived listing

nodes.label: Delete Draft
nodes.why: Hard delete (draft only)

nodes.label: Create Draft
nodes.why: Empty draft created

nodes.label: Upload Photos
nodes.why: Step 1: Photos — Sharp resize 1200x1200 max + 400x400 thumb. Stored as WebP in listing-images bucket.

nodes.label: Select Category
nodes.why: Step 2: Category (10 options) + Condition (6 tiers)

nodes.label: Enter Details
nodes.why: Step 3: title, brand, description, species, state, listing type

nodes.label: Set Pricing
nodes.why: Step 4: Pricing (dollars stored as cents) + Shipping options

nodes.label: Review Listing
nodes.why: Step 5: Preview all fields before publish

nodes.why: GET /api/listings/[id] — pre-populate wizard

nodes.label: Edit Listing Fields
nodes.why: Same 5-step wizard, tracks changedFields for partial save. No localStorage persistence.

nodes.label: Save Changes
nodes.why: Only changed fields sent

nodes.label: Manage Photos
nodes.why: Add new photos or delete existing. Remaining photos re-sequenced.

nodes.label: Fetch Seller Listings
nodes.why: All listings, all statuses

nodes.label: Filter by Status Tab
nodes.why: Tabs: Active, Drafts, Sold, Archived

nodes.label: Active Actions
nodes.why: Edit, Mark Sold, Archive, Quick Edit Price, Duplicate

nodes.label: Duplicate Listing
nodes.why: New draft with copied fields. Opens at Step 1 — needs photos.

nodes.label: Draft Actions
nodes.why: Continue editing or delete draft (hard delete)

nodes.label: Archived Actions
nodes.why: Reactivate → PATCH status=active

journeys.title: Listing Social Sharing

nodes.label: Check Share API

nodes.label: Open Creation Form
nodes.why: Reachable from onboarding, dashboard, or seller opt-in modal

nodes.label: Generate Slug
nodes.why: Auto-generate slug from shop name

nodes.label: Check Slug Available
nodes.why: checkShopSlugAvailable(slug)

nodes.why: Reserve slug in slugs table (atomic)

nodes.label: Create Shop Row
nodes.why: Create shop row (owner_id = user)

journeys.title: Shop Invite → Accept (or Register & Auto-Accept)
journeys.description: A user receives a shop invite email, lands on the invite page, and either accepts directly (if authenticated) or registers a new account with auto-accept.

nodes.label: Enter Invite Details
nodes.why: Enter recipient email + select role. RoleSelect filters out Owner. Validates via validateInviteInput().

nodes.label: Create Invite
nodes.why: Requires requireShopPermission('members', 'full'). Enforces 5-member cap.

errorCases.condition: Duplicate pending invite for same email

nodes.label: Insert Invite Row
nodes.why: shop_invites row with 7-day expiry token

nodes.label: Send Invite Email
nodes.why: Send via Resend with /invite/{token} link. Email failure logged but does NOT block 201 response.

nodes.label: Open Invite Page
nodes.why: Server component fetches invite data via admin client. Invalid token → 404.

nodes.label: Check Auth Session
nodes.why: InviteAccept checks useAuth() session

nodes.label: Show Accept Button
nodes.why: Shows shop name, avatar, inviter name, assigned role

nodes.label: Accept Invite
nodes.why: Cookie session auth (no X-Nessi-Context). Looks up invite by token via admin client.

nodes.label: Create Membership
nodes.why: Insert shop_members row with invite's role_id

nodes.label: Mark Accepted
nodes.why: Update shop_invites status = 'accepted'

nodes.label: Redirect to Dashboard
nodes.why: Redirect to /dashboard + success toast. Shop now in navbar context switcher.

nodes.label: Open Invite Page
nodes.why: User lands without session

nodes.label: Show Auth Options
nodes.why: Show Sign Up and Sign In buttons (no Accept yet). Sign Up navigates to ?register=true&invite={token}

nodes.label: Detect Invite Params
nodes.why: Navbar useEffect detects ?register=true&invite={token}. Stores inviteToken, opens register modal, cleans URL.

nodes.label: Register Account
nodes.why: User enters email + password, submits registration

nodes.label: Verify OTP Code
nodes.why: 6-digit OTP code → verifyOtp(type='signup'). inviteToken threaded: Navbar → RegisterForm → OtpInput.

nodes.label: Set Session
nodes.why: Session established via cookies

nodes.label: Auto-Accept Invite
nodes.why: acceptShopInvite(token) called in OtpInput after verify. Failure NEVER blocks — account always completes.

nodes.label: Show Joined Toast
nodes.why: Toast: 'You've joined {shopName}!' + redirect to /dashboard. onInviteAccepted callback fires.

journeys.title: Shop Member Journey (Join, Work, Leave)
journeys.description: Shop member lifecycle: switch to shop context, work within role-based permissions, leave shop with confirmation, and handle context revocation when removed by owner.

nodes.label: Switch to Shop
nodes.why: Member clicks shop name in navbar context switcher

nodes.label: Set Context Header
nodes.why: X-Nessi-Context: shop:{shopId} set on all requests

nodes.label: Create Shop Listing
nodes.why: Listing created with shop_id set, visible on shop page

nodes.label: Role-Based Access
nodes.why: Owner/Manager: settings + members. Contributor: own listings only.

nodes.label: Switch to Personal
nodes.why: switchToMember() — X-Nessi-Context: member

nodes.label: Click Leave Shop
nodes.why: Leave button NOT shown for owners — must transfer ownership first

nodes.label: Type Confirmation
nodes.why: Type: 'I {name} want to leave {shopName}'

nodes.label: Leave Shop
nodes.why: removeShopMember(shopId, myMemberId)

nodes.label: Revert to Personal
nodes.why: switchToMember() — revert to personal context

nodes.label: Invalidate Queries
nodes.why: Invalidate shop queries

nodes.label: Show Left Toast
nodes.why: Toast: 'You left {shopName}'

nodes.label: Close Modal
nodes.why: Modal closes, user in member context

nodes.label: Owner Removes Member
nodes.why: Owner removes member from shop via API

nodes.label: Next API Call
nodes.why: Member's next API call includes shop context

nodes.label: Receive 403
nodes.why: API returns 403 Forbidden

nodes.label: Handle Revocation
nodes.why: handleContextRevocation() fires with 2s dedup check

nodes.label: Revert to Personal
nodes.why: switchToMember() — revert to personal context

nodes.label: Cancel All Queries
nodes.why: Cancel all queries + invalidate cache

nodes.label: Dispatch Event
nodes.why: Dispatch 'nessi:context-revoked' event

nodes.label: Show Removed Toast
nodes.why: ContextRevocationListener — Toast: 'You have been removed from shop'

nodes.label: Go to Dashboard
nodes.why: Navigate to /dashboard

nodes.label: Fetch User Shops
nodes.why: getShopsByMember(memberId) — fetch all shops

nodes.label: Show Shop Dropdown
nodes.why: Navbar dropdown lists all shops + personal profile

nodes.label: Select Identity
nodes.why: Select identity: personal, or any shop (with role)

nodes.label: Set Context Store
nodes.why: Set context in Zustand store

nodes.label: Persist to Storage
nodes.why: Persisted to localStorage — survives page refresh

journeys.title: Shop Member Management (Invite, Remove, Roles)
journeys.description: Owner manages shop members: invite via email, resend/revoke invites, remove members, and assign roles with permission enforcement.

nodes.label: Enter Invite Details
nodes.why: Enter email + select role

nodes.label: Check Limits
nodes.why: Server-side checks: member cap, existing member, duplicate invite

nodes.label: Insert Invite Row
nodes.why: shop_invites row with 7-day expiry

nodes.label: Send Invite Email
nodes.why: Send via Resend with /invite/{token} link

nodes.label: Regenerate Token
nodes.why: Regenerate token + reset expiry to 7 days

nodes.label: Resend Email
nodes.why: Resend invite email with new token

nodes.label: Mark as Revoked
nodes.why: Set status = 'revoked'

nodes.label: Delete Membership Row
nodes.why: Member removed from shop_members

nodes.label: Trigger Revocation
nodes.why: If member was in shop context: 403 on next API call triggers revocation. See context-switching.json.

nodes.label: Show Role Dropdown
nodes.why: Each member row has RoleSelect dropdown (disabled for owner)

nodes.label: Update Cache
nodes.why: Optimistic cache update

nodes.label: Show Role Toast
nodes.why: Toast: 'Role updated to {roleName}'

nodes.label: Apply Permissions
nodes.why: Member's permissions change immediately

journeys.title: Shop Ownership Transfer (Request → Accept → Cancel)
journeys.description: Owner initiates ownership transfer to another member. Transferee receives email link, accepts on a dedicated page. Includes atomic role swap and cancellation flow.

nodes.label: Select New Owner
nodes.why: Select new owner from current members

nodes.label: Confirm Transfer
nodes.why: Two-step confirmation modal

nodes.label: Create Transfer Row
nodes.why: Insert shop_ownership_transfers row (status: pending, 7-day expiry)

nodes.label: Send Transfer Email
nodes.why: Ownership transfer email with /shop/transfer/{token} link

nodes.label: Show Pending Status
nodes.why: Pending status card with transferee name + expiry

nodes.label: Check Auth
nodes.why: proxy.ts: check authentication

nodes.label: Validate Transfer
nodes.why: Server component fetches transfer via admin client — validate status, user, expiry

nodes.label: Show Accept UI
nodes.why: TransferAccept component

nodes.label: Swap Ownership
nodes.why: Atomic swap: owner_id → new owner, new role → OWNER, old role → MANAGER, status → accepted

nodes.label: Transfer Complete
nodes.why: Ownership transferred successfully

nodes.label: Confirm Cancellation
nodes.why: Confirmation modal

nodes.label: Mark as Cancelled
nodes.why: Set transfer status → cancelled

journeys.title: Shop Roles & Permissions
journeys.description: Roles & Permissions page showing system role cards (Owner, Manager, Contributor) with permission matrix. Custom roles gated behind premium plan.

nodes.label: Check User Role
nodes.why: ShopRouteGuard checks user role. Contributors redirected to /dashboard.

nodes.label: Show System Roles
nodes.why: System Roles section with RoleCards

nodes.label: Owner Role Card
nodes.why: All 6 domains at 'full' permission level

nodes.label: Manager Role Card
nodes.why: listings/pricing/orders/messaging 'full', shop_settings 'view', members 'none'

nodes.label: Contributor Role Card
nodes.why: listings 'full' only

nodes.label: Show Permission Grid
nodes.why: Each card shows PermissionMatrix grid

nodes.label: Show Upsell Modal
nodes.why: CustomRoleUpsellModal — premium plan gate (not yet available)

journeys.title: Shop Settings & Deletion
journeys.description: Shop settings page with sections for details, hero banner, subscription (planned), and shop deletion with full storage cleanup.

nodes.label: Edit Shop Name
nodes.why: Inline-edit shop name

nodes.label: Edit Shop Slug
nodes.why: Edit slug with availability check

nodes.label: Upload Shop Avatar
nodes.why: 200x200 WebP via Sharp

nodes.label: Process Banner Image
nodes.why: Sharp: max 1200x400, convert to WebP

nodes.label: Store in Bucket
nodes.why: Stored in profile-assets bucket

nodes.label: Type Confirmation
nodes.why: Type shop name to confirm deletion

nodes.label: Delete Avatar
nodes.why: Delete avatar from storage

nodes.label: Delete Hero Banner
nodes.why: Delete hero banner from storage

nodes.label: Delete Listing Photos
nodes.why: Delete all shop listing photos from storage

journeys.title: Signup (Email + OTP)
journeys.description: New user registers with email and password, verifies via 6-digit OTP code, and gets a session. Includes invite auto-accept, cart merge, and recently-viewed merge as background side effects.

nodes.label: Open Sign Up Modal
nodes.why: User clicks Sign Up in navbar, modal opens with RegisterForm

nodes.label: Enter Credentials
nodes.why: Email + password fields with client-side validation: email format, password min 8 chars

nodes.label: Create User Account
nodes.why: Admin client creates user, bypassing email confirmation flow. Triggers Supabase to send OTP email.

nodes.label: Show OTP Input
nodes.why: Form transitions to OTP input in same modal, no page change

nodes.label: Enter OTP Code
nodes.why: User enters 6-digit code from email

nodes.label: Verify OTP
nodes.why: verifyOtp(type='signup') — on success, Supabase sets session cookies

nodes.label: Check Invite Token
nodes.why: Token was stored in Navbar state from ?register=true&invite={token}. Threaded to OtpInput via props.

nodes.label: Auto-Accept Invite
nodes.why: acceptShopInvite(token) — only fires if invite token present. Failure never blocks. See shop-invite-acceptance.json.

nodes.label: Merge Guest Cart
nodes.why: useCartMerge() merges localStorage cart to DB. Silent, no toast. See guest-cart.json.

nodes.label: Merge Recently Viewed
nodes.why: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — POST /api/recently-viewed/merge. Deduplicates on server. Silent.

nodes.label: Check Onboarding
nodes.why: Check onboarding_completed_at on member record. If null → banner appears. If set → user stays on current page.
